parameters.query: SELECT id, person_name, person_phone, whatsapp_group_id, report_types, task_notes FROM sunfra_unified_reminders WHERE frequency = 'daily'
SELECT id, shead_name, category, notes, sender, group_name, processed_time FROM sunfra_processed_data WHERE DATE(processed_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT id, sender, group_name, raw_text, timestamp FROM sunfra_raw_messages WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURDATE()
